title: Teff Crusted Fried Waffles
description: A crispy teff crust on a classic waffle, served with a side of sweet syrup.

ingredients.name: free-range egg
ingredients.notes: or flax egg for vegan option

instructions: Preheat a non-stick waffle iron to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together teff flour, sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg and non-dairy milk.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until combined. Do not overmix.
Heat the canola oil in a small skillet over medium heat.
Drop the waffle batter into the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the waffle and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until crispy.
Serve the waffles hot with a side of syrup.
